title: Tala Fridge and Freezer Thermometer with Clear and Easy to read display, Work from -25 to + 25 degrees celsius (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
EASY READ: The Tala Fridge and Freezer Thermometer are clear and easy to read with a Blue to Read temperture scale to show the best tempertures
HANG OR STAND: this Thermometer has been designed to be able to stand of the shelf or to hang so that it can be situated in the most convenient place
FAHRENHEIT & CELSIUS: This Thermometer displays both Fahrenheit and Celsius for quick and easy use
INSTANT READ: This thermometer is design to react quickly and will display within seconds a true read of the conditions, for a precise reading please leavein place for 60 seconds
TRIED AND TESTED: Tala has been supplying Kitchenware Gadgets since 1899
